summary: First testing run for AAWAZ. Backend: all 7 pytest API tests passing (root, categories, products list+filter, chat with Claude, TTS, transcribe validation). Frontend: Landing page renders correctly with hero, CTA 'Try AAWAZ Now'. Dashboard loads, 8 products displayed with images/prices/delivery time, category filter (Vegetables -> 2 products) works, search 'milk' filters to 1 product, ADD button increments cart badge to 1 and shows success toast. AI floating mic button visible bottom-right. One verification gap: AI overlay opening could not be confirmed via my generic selectors after clicking mic.

minor.issue: Writes uploaded audio to /tmp using untrusted filename (path traversal risk) and not cleaned up on exception
EMERGENT_LLM_KEY not validated at startup; if missing, chat endpoint will 500 only at request time

ui_bugs.issue: After clicking [data-testid='ai-mic-button'], no element matched data-testid='ai-overlay'/'ai-assistant-overlay'/role=dialog. Either overlay missing data-testid or it does not open without mic permissions. Needs explicit data-testid like 'ai-assistant-overlay' and 'ai-overlay-close' for testability.
Cart badge count is rendered inside [data-testid='cart-button'] without a dedicated data-testid (e.g. 'cart-count'). Hard to assert count programmatically.

issues: Only one CTA visible above the fold; features grid text seen via inner_text but only 2 images on landing - features grid may rely on icons/SVGs which is fine, just confirm visuals match Blinkit-style spec

action_items: Add data-testid='ai-assistant-overlay' (and close button testid) to AIAssistant overlay so it can be asserted in automated tests
Add data-testid='cart-count' to cart badge in Header for testable count
Sanitize uploaded filename in /api/voice/transcribe (use uuid temp path) and ensure cleanup in finally block
Validate EMERGENT_LLM_KEY presence at startup with a clear error
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses os.environ['MONGO_URL'] (will KeyError on missing) but os.getenv('EMERGENT_LLM_KEY') silently returns None — inconsistent; prefer fail-fast for required keys.
Transcribe handler saves to /tmp/{file.filename} - path traversal & no cleanup on error. Use tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile.
Chat endpoint creates a brand-new LlmChat per request; session_id is reused server-side via emergentintegrations but no rate limiting/abuse protection.
Products endpoint excludes _id correctly via projection (good).
Hardcoded 100 limit in db.products.find().to_list(100) — fine for MVP, document if more products are added.
No pagination on /api/products and no error handling around mongo calls.
test_credentials: Not applicable - no auth required for AAWAZ MVP. /app/memory/test_credentials.md not checked (no auth in app).
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 8 products on startup via seed_products(); verified present via /api/products returning 8 items.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all endpoints incl. live Claude (chat) and OpenAI TTS calls via emergentintegrations. Dashboard testids used: search-input, cart-button, category-{all|vegetables|snacks|dairy|drinks}, product-card-{uuid}, add-to-cart-{uuid}, ai-mic-button. Missing testids: ai-assistant overlay container, cart count badge. Voice transcribe needs a real audio upload to test happy path; current test only validates 422 on missing file.
rca of the issue: AI overlay open could not be verified because the overlay container likely has no data-testid matching common patterns. Recommend main agent to add data-testid to overlay root element.
